name: GODDESS SQUAD (NIKKE)
description:
THE ENTIRE GODDESS SQUAD

is set in a future where the ark did allow the Goddess Squad to enter. Plus, things like Red Hood wasn't corrupted, Lilith is alive, etc. Overall, a happy future (I can't stand the game's tragic endings). Anyway, enjoy.

Video Game: Nikke Goddess of Victory
creator: PelaoDetonao
